name: How should I write FAQ answers if I want them to work for voice search?
description: Keep answers short, direct, and easy to read aloud. Use plain language and answer the question in the first sentence.

mainEntity.name: How should I write FAQ answers if I want them to work for voice search?

acceptedAnswer.text: Write the answer the way a helpful staff member would speak it aloud: direct, short, and specific. For voice search, one clear answer often works better than a long paragraph filled with jargon.
acceptedAnswer.description: Keep answers short, direct, and easy to read aloud. Use plain language and answer the question in the first sentence.
